summary: Iteration 10: Full testing of new homepage redesign (Netflix-style) and search screen. 27/27 backend tests pass (100%). All 12 frontend features verified. One critical issue found and fixed: /search route was broken (Unmatched Route) because search.tsx was added after the Expo server started - fixed by restarting the expo server.

ui_bugs.issue: Level chip shows 'Debutant' (no accent). The code uses level.toLowerCase() === 'débutant' for color styling, but if DB stores 'Debutant' without accent, the chip renders without correct color. Minor cosmetic issue.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: /search route showed 'Unmatched Route' because search.tsx was added after expo server started (CI mode disables hot reload for new files). Fixed by restarting expo server. In production deployments, file is present at startup so this won't recur.

issues: Scholar names show only last name (code: scholar.name?.split(' ').slice(-1)[0]). 'Ksiks' and 'Sebti' visible - correct per code intent, but shows just last name only.
Level chip 'Debutant' lacks French accent - should be 'Débutant' for correct CSS color match

test_results_detail.frontend_greeting: PASS: 'Bonsoir, Test' - first name only, no Sijill logo

action_items: LOW: Ensure course 'level' field in DB uses French accents ('Débutant', 'Intermédiaire', 'Avancé') to match the level chip color logic in index.tsx
INFO: The /search route fix was done by restarting expo. In future if new route files are added and Expo runs in CI mode, server restart is needed to pick them up.
critical_code_review_comments: search.tsx missing from Stack.Screen list in _layout.tsx - while Expo Router auto-discovers it, explicitly adding '<Stack.Screen name="search" />' would be defensive and improve clarity
Home API fetches all courses for bandeaux (up to 50) with individual episode queries - could be slow with many courses; consider pagination or caching for production scale
Search endpoint has no auth requirement - correct for public search, but rate limiting should be considered for production
POST /api/audios/{id}/play returns 200 even for non-existent audio IDs (silent update) - consider adding 404 check for invalid IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign fully verified: greeting, hero card (À LA UNE + Commencer), recommendations, scholars, top10, bandeaux all working. Search screen (/search) now works after expo restart - was broken initially because search.tsx was added after CI-mode Metro started. All backend APIs pass: GET /api/home, GET /api/search, POST /api/audios/{id}/play, GET/PUT /api/admin/top10. Note: login returns 'token' field (not 'access_token') - use resp.json().get('token') in test fixtures.

search_route_unmatched.root_cause: Metro bundler runs in CI mode (CI=true env var), which disables file watching / hot reload. When search.tsx was added after the server started, Metro didn't discover the new route file.
search_route_unmatched.reproduction: Add a new route file to app/ directory → navigate to that route → 'Unmatched Route' error
search_route_unmatched.fix: Restart expo server: sudo supervisorctl restart expo
search_route_unmatched.prevention: Add '<Stack.Screen name="search" />' to _layout.tsx (though this doesn't help in CI mode) OR ensure new route files are present before server start
